hero.name: Alex Morgan
hero.title: Software Engineer
hero.description: I build accessible, performant digital experiences for the web. Currently focused on crafting interfaces that blend thoughtful design with robust engineering.

about.heading: About
paragraphs: I'm a developer passionate about building software that feels intuitive and performs beautifully. My work sits at the intersection of design and engineering, creating experiences that are meticulously built for performance and usability.
In my spare time, I contribute to open-source projects, experiment with creative coding, and explore the latest in web technologies.

projects.title: Flux UI
projects.description: A component library built for speed. Composable, accessible primitives designed for modern web applications.

projects.title: Dataflow
projects.description: Real-time data visualization dashboard for monitoring distributed systems at scale.

projects.title: Synth
projects.description: A web-based synthesizer using the Web Audio API. Experiment with sounds directly in the browser.

projects.title: Markdown Writer
projects.description: A minimal, distraction-free writing tool focused on speed and a beautiful editing experience.

experience.description: Building and maintaining the core web infrastructure, working on developer-facing tools and the platform dashboard.
Developed payment processing interfaces and worked on the design system powering the Stripe Dashboard.
Contributed to the issue tracking interface, focusing on performance optimization and accessibility.

contact.heading: Get in touch
contact.description: If you would like to discuss a project or just say hi, I'm always open to a conversation.
